title: Three-Arbitrator Tribunal with Indian Council of Arbitration Fallback
text_english: Each dispute submitted to ARBITRATION SHALL be HEARD by an ARBITRATION TRIBUNAL composed of {{num_arbitrators}} (default 3) ARBITRATORS. (a) Authority and Contractor SHALL EACH APPOINT ONE arbitrator; the two arbitrators SHALL JOINTLY APPOINT the THIRD arbitrator who SHALL CHAIR the tribunal. (b) If the named arbitrators DO NOT SUCCEED in appointing a third arbitrator within {{third_arbitrator_days}} (default 30) DAYS after the latter of the two has been appointed, the THIRD ARBITRATOR SHALL — at the request of either Party — be APPOINTED by the SECRETARY of the {{fallback_institution}} (default Indian Council of Arbitration, New Delhi). (c) If one Party FAILS to APPOINT its arbitrator within {{single_arbitrator_days}} (default 30) DAYS after the other Party has appointed, the Party which has named an arbitrator may APPLY to the Secretary of the fallback institution.

parameters.name: fallback_institution
parameters.label: Fallback Appointing Institution
parameters.example: Indian Council of Arbitration, New Delhi
